query: Timely: Pull your calendar availability in 3 seconds alternative

results.title: Top Calendly Alternatives in 2026 | Zoom
results.content:
If Zoom Workplace is your go-to for your work communications, you can pull up your scheduling tool in the same platform where your video meetings, chat messages, and phone calls happen. Zoom Scheduler is tightly integrated with Zoom Workplace, making it an ideal choice not just for sharing your availability, but also for creating a seamless workflow with less toggling between apps. All it takes is a few simple clicks to go from chatting with your colleagues to sending a scheduling link. [...] Zoom Scheduler integrates with Google and Microsoft 365 calendars, as well as Zoom Mail & Calendar Service, and supports up to six calendar connections per user. This syncs your availability with Scheduler, meaning the person scheduling a meeting with you will only be able to select times when youãre free. When an appointment is set, your meeting attendees can receive reminders by email or text message. Best of all, youãll benefit from the convenience of one app to manage your scheduling, calendar, and meetings. [...] Cal.com is a simple scheduling software option that lets you connect multiple calendars, set your availability, and share your booking link so people can schedule appointments with you. It has a routing form feature for collecting information from invitees so you can route them to the right staff person or event. You can also automate processes around your event, like sending reminders to attendees or automatically notifying the host if the appointment is canceled. Like Setmore, Cal.com also allows you to collect payment when booking an appointment.

### 8. Zoho Bookings: great if you need flexibility in video platforms

results.title: 8 Powerful Calendly Alternatives to Improve Time Management
results.content:
## The 8 Best Calendly Alternatives

1. Simplybook.me ã Most flexibility
2. Setmore ã Payment processing included on free plan
3. Book Like A Boss ã Unique features
4. Trafft ã Generous free plan
5. Squarespace Scheduling ã Professional-looking booking platform for any website
6. Wix Bookings ã For Wix users
7. TimeSync ã Great for scheduling phone and video calls
8. Monday.com ã Internal scheduling and project management tool

Taking appointments and scheduling is an integral part of many small and large businesses.

In the past, youãd call up and enquire about available times, perhaps someone would answer, perhaps youãd have to try again later. Once you got the appointment, youãd make a note on the calendar on your wall or in your diary, which was always going walkabouts. [...] | Calendly | SimplyBook.me | Setmore | Book Like A Boss | Trafft | Squarespace Scheduling | Wix Bookings | TimeSync | Monday.com |
 ---  ---  ---  --- 
| Calendar syncing | Outlook Office 365  iCloud  Google | Google Outlook | Outlook Office 365  iCloud  Google | Google  Office 365 | Google Outlook | Outlook Office 365  iCloud  Google | Google | Google Calendar  Outlook | Only on higher-tier plan |
| Payment processing | Stripe (paid plan) PayPal (paid plan) | Over 40, including PayPal Square Stripe | Stripe (paid plan) PayPal (paid plan)  Square (paid plan) | Square (free) Stripe (paid plan) | Stripe PayPal  Authorize.net | Stripe PayPal  Square | Wix Payments PayPal  Stripe  More available | PayPal Stripe | No | [...] ## A Detailed Look at The Best Calendly Alternatives

### 1. SimplyBook.me

Founded in 2008, SimplyBook.me is a few years older than Calendly. It also has a nice range of features and design options, which is why I think it makes a great Calendly alternative.

Where SimplyBook.me beats Calendly:

SimplyBook.me is unique in that it offers a range of really good-looking, responsive website templates. This is great for those who are looking for both a booking app and a simple landing page in one. I have to say that for very little effort, you can get a very professional-looking site, albeit a basic one.

results.title: 8 Best Calendly Alternatives in 2026 (+ Bonus, Compared)
results.content:
### Cal.com cons

 UX is busier than Calendly's, with more knobs to turn.
 Custom domain is only on Organizations ($28/user/month).
 Self-hosting is real work; the hosted product is the practical default for most teams.

### Pricing

Trial: 14-day trial on paid tiers  
 Billing: monthly and annual (annual saves 25%)  
 Free: $0 / month (individual)  
 Teams: $12 / user / month  
 Organizations: $28 / user / month  
 Enterprise: custom (dedicated infrastructure, SLA, support)

# SavvyCal

SavvyCal  
 SavvyCal is the power-user pick. Its signature move: instead of dumping a list of slots on your invitee, it overlays your availability on top of their calendar so they can pick a slot that's good for both of you.

### What makes SavvyCal a great Calendly alternative? [...] ## What's the best Calendly alternative for you?

If you want brand control or proper team admin, Sprintful is the pick. Custom domain, branded notifications, and team admin are on at the entry tier, not gated to Enterprise.

If you want open-source and self-hostable, pick Cal.com.

If you sell services, packages, or memberships, pick Acuity.

If you live inside HubSpot or Microsoft 365, use what's already bundled.

Free trials exist for nearly all of these. Testing two of them side by side for a week will tell you more than any comparison table.

ôˋ 2026 Calendly Alternatives. All rights reserved.

results.title: 11 Best Calendly Alternatives: Your Go-To List for 2026
results.content:
YouCanBookMe lets you choose how you display your availabilityãbetween a month, week, or day view, which Calendlyãs booking pages donãt offer.
 YouCanBookMe supports Apple (iCloud), Google, Microsoft, and Fastmail calendars. Calendly no longer offers native Apple Calendar integration.
 YouCanBookMe can auto-detect user location and adjust the booking page grid language with 44 supported languages, compared to only 9 language options available with Calendly.
 YouCanBookMe offers unlimited custom colors for booking pages, while Calendly and other YouCanBookMe alternatives only have a few select choices (only on the premium plans). [...] OnceHub takes a more deliberate approach. Instead of immediately showing availability, it collects context first. Bookers can be asked about the purpose of the meeting, urgency, participants, or location before anything is scheduled. Based on those responses, OnceHub can route the request to the right person, calendar, or next step, or prevent a meeting from being booked at all.

### OnceHub pricing [...] trafft calendly alternative for multi location businesses

Ease of use

Integrations

Value for money

Customization

Last but not least on our list of Calendly alternatives is Trafft. Trafft is an appointment scheduling platform built for service-based businesses that need bookings, payments, and operations to work together. Rather than focusing on meetings alone, Trafft helps teams manage services, staff availability, locations, and customer data from one dashboard.
